_note_sampleSize: 10 > items returned => Tier 2 judge never fires => pure clean-path plumbing test. To exercise Tier 2, set this to 3 and provide GEMINI_API_KEY.
_note_geminiApiKey: You can also pass geminiApiKey here instead of the env var; it is marked secret in input_schema.json.
_usage: Copy to storage/key_value_stores/default/INPUT.json (gitignored), then `apify run` or `npm run dev:real`.
